## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated when behavior changes
- [ ] `composer run test` passes (or Magento-root PHPUnit equivalent)
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md`) when needed
- [ ] No secrets or store-specific credentials included
